title: [memsafety] unresolved merge conflict markers in coap_dtn.c
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c still contains <<<<<<< HEAD / ======= / >>>>>>> markers from recent merge (fcba7030f). This can lead to incorrect code paths, potential buffer mishandling in parse_recipient() and dtn_expire_work_handler(). zcbor usage assumes valid state but conflicted code risks use of wrong memcpy or bounds. Priority 0 bug. Reviewed last 20 commits focusing on C changes in edhoc.c, link_rx.c, trickle.c, lora_l2.c, coap_*.c, meshtastic/*.c, adapter.c. No strcpy/sprintf found; mostly safe snprintf/memcpy with explicit lens. Other potential: check for missing NULL after merge.
